translations.### 一個週末午後 + Claude Design + Claude Code: ### One Weekend Afternoon + Claude Design + Claude Code = Create a Blog with Your Own Style
translations.#### 1. 在本地建立一個乾淨的 Jekyll Blog\n\n: #### 1. Create a clean Jekyll Blog locally
translations.#### 2. 搜集 Theme 頁面案例並上傳到 Claude Design\: #### 2. Collect Theme Page Examples and Upload to Claude Design
translations.#### 7. 請 Claude Code 實現 Claude Design 設: #### 7. Ask Claude Code to Implement the Claude Design Mockup
translations.**Design:** Claude Design (Blog 頁面不多，2 小: **Design:** Claude Design (The blog pages are few, so 2 hours of usage is enough)
translations.**Engineering:** Claude Code Max ($100 U: **Engineering:** Claude Code Max ($100 USD, 5-hour quota **finished before fully used**)
translations.**Jekyll 預設的 Blog 專案樣式非常陽春:**\n\n: **The default Jekyll Blog project style is very basic:**
translations.**來來回回找了好幾輪，最終找到一個佈局不差、支援 RWD、Blog 功能完善的: **After several rounds of searching back and forth, I finally found a theme with a decent layout, responsive design, and complete blog features — [Theme Chirpy](https://github.com/cotes2020/jekyll-theme-chirpy){:target="_blank"} :**
translations.**如果想調整新的頁面設計，建議回到 Claude Design 修改設計稿，調: **If you want to adjust the new page design, it is recommended to go back to Claude Design to modify the design draft. After adjusting, download it again and place it back in the directory; it is not recommended to ask Claude Code to do visual design directly, as it is not very good at aesthetics.**
translations.**將 Theme 頁面案例上傳到 Claude Design，選擇「Attac: **Upload the Theme page example to Claude Design and select "Attach codebase":**
translations.**建一個 Theme 目錄，把所有頁面跟附加檔案都放進去:**\n\n: **Create a Theme directory and put all pages and additional files inside:**
translations.**選擇剛剛整理好的 Theme 目錄:**\n\n: **Select the Theme directory you just organized:**
translations.**選擇完成後，輸入 Prompt 請 Claude Design 幫你設計頁面: **After making your selection, enter a prompt to ask Claude Design to create the page for you:**
translations.*使用 ./MyBlogTheme 的主題設計套用到我的 blog*\n\n: *Apply the theme design from ./MyBlogTheme to my blog*
translations.*花了一個週末午後，用 Claude Design 設計喜歡的 Blog 樣式與: *Spent a weekend afternoon designing my preferred Blog style and features with Claude Design, then implemented and applied them back to my Jekyll Blog using Claude Code, perfectly replacing the 5-year-old Chirpy Theme interface with my ideal personal Blog style.*
translations.*重新設計我的 Blog，用繁體中文跟我交流。*\n\n: *Redesign my Blog, communicate with me in Traditional Chinese.*
translations.- **Blog Structure:** Jekyll Static Webs:
- **Blog Structure:** Jekyll Static Website

- **Original Article File:** Markdown file

- **Server/Web Hosting:** GitHub Pages (free and reliable)

- **Engineering:** Claude Code Max ($100 USD, 5-hour quota **finished before fully used**)

- **Design:** Claude Design (The blog pages are few, so 2 hours of usage is enough)
translations.- Claude Code Max $100 USD\n\n- Server/W:
- Claude Code Max $100 USD

- Server/Web Hosting: $0 USD

- Jekyll Theme: $0 USD

- Time: One weekend afternoon
translations.- Drawer Menu (topbar menu / overlay / E:
- Drawer Menu (topbar menu / overlay / ESC to close)

- LQIP hydrator & Lazy Load — Article Image Placeholder & Lazy Loading

- Reading progress bar

- Client-side TOC

- Search: /search.json build-time + pure JS substring filter (no lunr)

- GLightbox v3 (CDN, MIT) — Image click to enlarge lightbox

- SCSS: assets/css/main.scss

- [Font Awesome](https://fontawesome.com/){:target="_blank"} icon svg
translations.- I also created my own Linktree using J:
- I also created my own Linktree using Jekyll: <https://link.zhgchg.li>{:target="_blank"}

- `jekyll new blog` quickly creates a default Blog project
translations.- The initial build took about 20K Token: - The initial build took about 20K Tokens (Opus 4.7 / effort: medium)
translations.- Want to see several visual style varia:
- Want to see several visual style variants? AI will generate multiple options for you to choose from

- Which tweaks would you like to adjust in real time?  
  What toggle features do you want for the debug widget in the bottom right corner?

- Fill in the rest according to your own preferences.
translations.- You can click the Tweak button at the:
- You can click the Tweak button at the bottom right to quickly adjust parameters and see the results.

- You can click the top right corner of the page to enlarge and view the full webpage; if there are interactive features, you can also operate the mockup directly.

- If clicks are unresponsive, scrolling is disabled, the page displays incompletely, or content is cut off, you can ask the AI to make adjustments.
translations.- You can tell the AI: `Your Blog will b:
- You can tell the AI: `Your Blog will be deployed to GitHub Pages` or another platform, because each platform may have different features. For example, GitHub Pages only allows certain [Jekyll Plugins](https://github.com/github/pages-gem/blob/master/lib/github-pages/plugins.rb#L21-L42){:target="_blank"}, and plugins not on the allowed list won’t work after deployment.

- You can tell the AI: `Prioritize using native Jekyll features, Jekyll Plugins, and free open-source projects to implement functionality.`

- You can tell the AI: `Website design must prioritize SEO structure and RWD user experience.`

- You can tell the AI: `Design a new Theme to replace the existing one`.

- The CI/CD YAML for deploying to GitHub Pages can also be written by AI, and it will guide you through the steps as well.

- **If you want to adjust the new page design, it is recommended to go back to Claude Design to modify the design draft. After adjusting, download it again and place it back in the directory; it is not recommended to ask Claude Code to do visual design directly, as it is not very good at aesthetics.**
translations.- jekyll 4.3 + kramdown (GFM) + kramdown:
- jekyll 4.3 + kramdown (GFM) + kramdown-parser-gfm

- rouge — code highlight

- jekyll-feed — Atom feed (/feed.xml)

- jekyll-sitemap — /sitemap.xml

- jekyll-paginate-v2 — Article Pagination Feature

- jekyll-archives — Archive Pages

- jekyll-seo-tag — SEO Meta Tag / OG / Twitter Card meta

- jekyll-redirect-from — Short URL redirect
translations.2018 年起在 Medium 撰寫文章紀錄程式與生活，後來自己開發了一個小工具: Since 2018, I have been writing articles on Medium to document programming and life. Later, I developed a small tool [ZMediumToMarkdown](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown){:target="_blank"} that can download Medium articles and convert them into Markdown files for backup. I also built an independent Blog website using Jekyll + Chirpy theme, deployed on the free GitHub Pages.

translations.Jekyll 是一套很方便的靜態網站產生工具，可以把 Markdown 和模板轉: Jekyll is a convenient static site generator that converts Markdown and templates into HTML, which can then be uploaded to a hosting service to publish content online.
translations.LQIP hydrator & Lazy Load — 文章圖片 Placeho: LQIP hydrator & Lazy Load — Article Image Placeholder & Lazy Loading
translations.Search：/search.json build-time + 純 JS su: Search: /search.json build-time + pure JS substring filter (no lunr)
translations.```\n已完成 Blog 的重新設計，放在 Blog Redesign.htm:
```
The blog redesign is completed and saved in Blog Redesign.html.

Design System

Fonts: Noto Serif TC (Song typeface) + Inter + JetBrains Mono
Color scheme: Warm paper off-white + Red clay primary color (oklch warm tone)
Three category axes: Technology / Travel / Sharing, all using real Chinese sample content
Two directions, total 7 artboards (double-click to preview full screen)

Direction A · Magazine Style

Homepage — Header title + Featured story + Three-column secondary articles + Numbered list + Newsletter
Article page — Full single post with table of contents, drop cap, introduction, code blocks, comments, related posts
Category page — 2×2 large image index
Tag page — Visual bar statistics + tag cloud
Archive page — Timeline by year + month
About page — Personal introduction + Now section + Subscription
Direction B · Modern Publication (Substack Style) 7. Homepage — Large hero image + card grid + sidebar subscription wall

Tweaks panel (open at bottom right) allows instant switching of:

Title font (Noto Serif / Source Han Serif)
Wide layout / Standard layout
Primary color and paper color (includes 4 preset palettes: Red clay, Deep blue, Dark green, Wine red)
```
translations.`jekyll new blog` 就能快速建立一個預設的 Blog 專案\n: `jekyll new blog` quickly creates a default Blog project
translations.jekyll-seo-tag — SEO Meta Tag / OG / Twi: jekyll-seo-tag — SEO Meta Tag / OG / Twitter Card meta
translations.一用就是 5 年，當中也有看得很膩想要換的時候；但每次鬼打牆找了一輪後，最後還是: I have been using it for 5 years. There were times when I got tired of it and wanted to switch; but after going through a cycle of searching, I always ended up coming back to [**Theme Chirpy**](https://github.com/cotes2020/jekyll-theme-chirpy){:target="_blank"}, as mentioned before, I couldn’t find a better-looking and more practical theme.
translations.下載並解壓縮後，把資料夾放到 Jekyll Blog 目錄中:\n\n: After downloading and extracting, place the folder into the Jekyll Blog directory:
translations.但是要找到滿意的 Jekyll Blog Theme 不太容易，有的是首頁漂亮、: However, finding a satisfactory Jekyll Blog Theme is not easy. Some have beautiful homepages, some offer great article page experiences, and others have good list pages. Even paid themes rarely meet all expectations. Sometimes, after installing and setting everything up, you realize a feature or page is missing, forcing you to abandon it and start over, which is very frustrating.
translations.使用 Claude Design + Claude Code 打造你專屬的 Je: Create Your Own Jekyll Theme Blog Using Claude Design + Claude Code
translations.其他就照喜好自己填寫囉。\n: Fill in the rest according to your own preferences.
translations.可以繼續跟 AI 對話請他加上你要的功能、調整現有功能，例如我希望文章末可以加入: You can continue the conversation with the AI to add the features you want or adjust existing ones. For example, if I want to add a "buy me a coffee" donation link and comments at the end of the article, **I can tell it:**
translations.可以跟 AI 說： `你的 Blog 會部署到 GitHub Pages` 或其: You can tell the AI: `Your Blog will be deployed to GitHub Pages` or another platform, because each platform may have different features. For example, GitHub Pages only allows certain [Jekyll Plugins](https://github.com/github/pages-gem/blob/master/lib/github-pages/plugins.rb#L21-L42){:target="_blank"}, and plugins not on the allowed list won’t work after deployment.
translations.可以跟 AI 說： `優先使用 Jekyll 原生、Jekyll Plugin、: You can tell the AI: `Prioritize using native Jekyll features, Jekyll Plugins, and free open-source projects to implement functionality.`
translations.可以跟 AI 說： `網站設計務必要重視 SEO 結構與 RWD 操作體驗。`\: You can tell the AI: `Website design must prioritize SEO structure and RWD user experience.`
translations.可以跟 AI 說： `設計新的 Theme 替代掉現有的` 。\n: You can tell the AI: `Design a new Theme to replace the existing one`.
translations.可以點擊右下角的 Tweak，快速調整參數並查看結果\n: You can click the Tweak button at the bottom right to quickly adjust parameters and see the results.
translations.可以點擊頁面右上角放大查看完整網頁；若有互動功能，也能直接操作 Mockup\n: You can click the top right corner of the page to enlarge and view the full webpage; if there are interactive features, you can also operate the mockup directly.
translations.執行 `bundle exec jekyll serve` 打開 http://: Run `bundle exec jekyll serve` and open http://127.0.0.1:4000/ to see the result:
translations.大約需要 3–5 分鐘，AI 會建立完整的 Design System（.css: It takes about 3–5 minutes for the AI to build a complete Design System (.css) and display the results using React.js/HTML.
translations.如果點擊無效、無法滾動、頁面顯示不完整或內容被裁切，都可以請 AI 調整\n: If clicks are unresponsive, scrolling is disabled, the page displays incompletely, or content is cut off, you can ask the AI to make adjustments.
translations.希望可即時調整哪些 Tweaks？右下角 Debug 小工具需要哪些切換功能\n:
Which tweaks would you like to adjust in real time?  
What toggle features do you want for the debug widget in the bottom right corner?
translations.想看幾個視覺方向的變體？ AI 會產出多個方案供你選擇\n: Want to see several visual style variants? AI will generate multiple options for you to choose from
translations.我也用 Jekyll 做了一個自己的 Linktree: <https://li: I also created my own Linktree using Jekyll: <https://link.zhgchg.li>{:target="_blank"}
translations.我直接到目前的 Blog，在各頁面按右鍵「Save as」例如 Home、Pos: I directly go to the current Blog and right-click "Save as" on each page, such as Home, Post, Page, PostList, Archives, Tags…
translations.抽屜選單（topbar menu / overlay / ESC 關閉）\n: Drawer Menu (topbar menu / overlay / ESC to close)
translations.持續跟 AI 對話把功能跟頁面設計成自己想要。\n\n: Keep interacting with AI to design the features and pages exactly as you want.
translations.接著持續請 AI 優化與修正問題，但基本完成度已經很高了！\n\n: Continue to have the AI optimize and fix issues, but the basic completion level is already very high!
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.直到 Claude Design + Claude Code 出現，我才一鼓作氣: Until Claude Design + Claude Code appeared, I finally took the plunge and asked AI to design the Blog style I wanted and implement the functional pages.
translations.記得先在 Jekyll Blog 目錄下執行一次 `/init` ，讓 AI 知: Remember to run `/init` once in the Jekyll Blog directory to let the AI recognize this is a Jekyll Blog structure.
translations.設計到滿意後，點右上角「Share」→「Download project as: After finalizing the design, click the "Share" button at the top right → "Download project as .zip" to download the original design files:
translations.送出對話後，Claude Design 會問你關於你想要的設計問題:\n\n: After submitting the conversation, Claude Design will ask you questions about the design you want:
translations.部署到 GitHub Pages 的 CI/CD YAML 也可以請 AI 寫，: The CI/CD YAML for deploying to GitHub Pages can also be written by AI, and it will guide you through the steps as well.
translations.首次建置大約花費 20K Tokens (Opus 4.7 / effort:: The initial build took about 20K Tokens (Opus 4.7 / effort: medium)
